release.change: Light mode — pick Light, Dark or System in Settings → Appearance
Accent colours — make Pulse yours: Neon Blue, Violet, Coral, Mint or Pink
Sleep insights — a sleep score, last-night stage hypnogram, nap detection and a 7-night trend
Week in Review — an animated weekly recap with an adaptive challenge, plus a Sunday-evening notification
Workouts — browse your recorded activities
Achievements — 14 badges to unlock; tap one to share it
VO₂ Max, Alarms and Calendar are now reachable from the menu
A welcome screen for first-time setup, and a personalised greeting on Today
New compact steps widget, and a refresh button on the home-screen widgets
Confetti when you hit a goal, and a chunkier progress ring with a rounded nub
Beat your goal? The ring keeps filling a second lap in a deeper shade
Redesigned Health tab — a customizable grid of metric cards with 7-day mini charts
Fuller Sleep tab — sleep score, last-night stages, bed/wake and a 7-night trend at a glance
Quick Settings tile — see today's steps from the pulldown and tap to open Pulse
Today's hero cards are now tinted tiles that fill with your progress
Lifetime totals and personal records on the Streak page; share your day as a card
Streaks: tap the flame to open a full Streak calendar — every day you hit your goal is highlighted
Goal celebration — the ring pops and you get a notification when you hit your daily goal
Goals moved to their own screen; set a sleep goal with an hours + minutes picker
Redesigned home-screen widget — pick your device and up to 3 stats, reconfigurable from the launcher
American units by default — miles, pounds and °F (changeable in Settings)
In-depth Steps charts restyled: neon line with a gradient fill and rounded stat cards
Toolbar device chip showing name + battery; redesigned About page
Stats now roll over to the new day at midnight instead of sticking on yesterday
Pulse heartbeat status-bar notification icon; all four tabs preload at launch
Shows "No sleep" instead of 0; fixed stat mix-ups with two devices and widget accuracy
Built-in weather: Pulse now fetches weather (Open-Meteo) and sends it to your watch
New Weather menu in the sidebar — use phone location or set a city
Custom daily step goal — tap the ring goal to set your own target
"On watch" shortcut to your Garmin's own settings (where supported)
All-native stat cards — tap any to open its in-depth chart
New pull-to-sync: the screen follows your finger and a thick bar fills as it syncs
Pulse splash + loading screen so stats never pop in
Much smoother — tabs load lazily and stats are computed off the main thread
Neon-themed app notification and in-depth charts
Pulse is here — a Garmin-only companion with a brand-new look
New Today home: big steps ring, live stat cards, and a device + battery chip
Four tabs: Today, Fitness, Sleep and Health, each with its own hero ring
zachy.cc aesthetic: near-black UI, neon-blue accents, Unbounded + Satoshi fonts
Fully dark throughout — toolbar, drawer, settings, Devices screen and gauges
Custom Pulse heartbeat app icon
Built on Gadgetbridge's Garmin engine — everything stays on your phone
